info.title: onehalf API
info.description: Generated from zod contracts in scripts/openapi/contracts

post.description: Authenticate an admin user with email and password. Returns a JWT access token and sets a refresh token cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated admin user profile. Requires Bearer token in Authorization header.

post.description: Authenticate a company user with email and password. Returns a JWT access token, the company slug, user profile with company info, and sets a refresh token cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated company user profile including company info. Requires Bearer token in Authorization header.
Retrieve a paginated list of orders for the authenticated company. Supports filtering by customer, status, order type, and free-text search.

post.description: Create a new order for the authenticated company. Order number and sales number are generated automatically. Amounts are calculated from items.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of quotations for the authenticated company. Supports filtering by customer, status, and free-text search.

post.description: Create a new quotation for the authenticated company. Quotation number is generated automatically. Amounts are calculated from items.
